projectDescription: TiXL is an open source, realtime motion graphics tool combining node-based procedural content creation, keyframe animation, and GPU-accelerated rendering for artists and technical creatives.
keyFeatures: Node-based (graph) procedural content creation with real-time rendering
Keyframe timeline animation with curve editing and dope sheet
DirectX 11 GPU-accelerated rendering pipeline with HLSL shader support
Extensive operator library: mesh, point clouds, particles, image FX, post-processing
Audio reactivity and MIDI/OSC/DMX/serial input integrations
Spout, NDI, and webcam video I/O for live performance and VJ use
Variations and preset system for exploring parameter spaces
Export to small standalone executable for deployment without the editor
Dear ImGui-based editor UI with real-time parameter editing
publicApiSurface: Symbol / SymbolRegistry — operator type registry and instantiation
Instance — runtime operator node with input/output slots
EvaluationContext — per-frame evaluation context passed through the graph
Slots (InputSlot<T>, OutputSlot<T>) — typed data connections between operators
ResourceManager — GPU resource loading, shader compilation, and asset management
Animator / VDefinition — keyframe animation curves and interpolation
PlaybackSettings — timeline playback state and loop controls
Player / Program — standalone exported project runtime bootstrap
IShaderOperator — interface for operators that own HLSL shader resources
Operator packages: Lib, TypeOperators, Mediapipe, Spout, NDI, Unsplash
